# Axonode

> Axonode is a next-generation community platform and hub designed for connecting developers, creatives, and innovators to collaborate, network, and drive tech innovation.

## Core Information
- **Domain:** https://www.axonode.org
- **Purpose:** Community engagement, networking, and project discovery for software developers and creative technologists.
- **Audience:** Developers, designers, tech teams, and innovators looking to collaborate on projects.

## Primary Navigation Links
These are the main public URLs accessible to search engines and automation agents:

- [Home](https://www.axonode.org/) - Main landing page showcasing the platform's mission and community features.
- [Join Portal](https://www.axonode.org/join) - Registration page for new members to sign up and join the Axonode network.
- [Login Portal](https://www.axonode.org/login) - Secure authentication page for existing community members.
- [Projects Hub](https://www.axonode.org/projects) - Showcase directory of community-driven development and creative works.

## Legal and Compliance
- [Terms of Service](https://www.axonode.org/terms) - Platform rules, user responsibilities, and service guidelines.
- [Code of Conduct](https://www.axonode.org/conduct) - Community standards ensuring a collaborative, respectful environment.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.axonode.org/privacy) - Data collection rules and user privacy protections.

## Restricted Endpoints
The following directories require session authentication, tokens, or unique states, and are explicitly restricted from general crawling/indexing:
- `/invited` (Private application onboarding)
- `/profile` (User-specific dashboards)
- `/credentials` (Sensitive security management)
